title_en: 15 Design-Forward DIY Tools Worth Upgrading to This Year
title_zh: 今年值得升级的15款设计导向DIY工具

paragraphs.en: Something has shifted in the workshop. After years of DIY being sold as a weekend hobby for the mildly bored, home improvement has quietly become a serious cultural force. The global DIY market is forecast to hit nearly a trillion dollars this year. And while a third of you are apparently planning on starting a new DIY project in the next three months, the primary motivator for DIYers is, you guessed it, saving money. Not a bad thing right now, considering how the Iran war is spiking prices.
paragraphs.zh: 车间里已经发生了变化。过去 DIY 常被当作有点无聊的人周末消遣的活动，如今居家改造已经悄悄成为一种严肃的文化力量。全球 DIY 市场预计今年将接近 1 万亿美元。并且虽然你们中约三分之一的人似乎正在计划在未来三个月内开始一个新的 DIY 项目，但 DIY 爱好者的主要驱动力是——你知道的——省钱。鉴于伊朗战争推高了物价，这一点并不坏。

paragraphs.en: The tape measure and the drill you inherited from your folks will only take you so far. Fortunately, the tools driving this boom have never been smarter, and better hardware should mean, hopefully, better results. Whether you're building furniture, finishing a deck, or just finally hanging that TV straight, the tools available right now are genuinely more precise than anything a generation ago could have imagined. From a miniaturized soldering station to a kid-safe desktop cardboard router, these are WIRED’s 15 picks worth making room for in your toolbox this year.
paragraphs.zh: 你从父母那里继承来的卷尺和电钻只能带你走到某个程度。幸运的是，推动这场热潮的工具从未像现在这样聪明，而更好的硬件也理应带来更好的结果。无论你是在做家具、铺设阳台，还是终于把电视架正正经经地装上墙，这些工具都比上一代想象得更精准。无论是微型化焊接台，还是儿童安全的桌面纸板路由机，这些都是 WIRED 今年值得在工具箱里腾出空间的 15 个选择。

paragraphs.en: And no matter how good your tools are, never forget: measure twice, cut once.
paragraphs.zh: 不管你的工具有多好，切记一句老话：先量两次，再切一次。

paragraphs.en: This intimidation-free power tool is perfect for people looking to conquer the multitude of household tasks that don’t require a massive hammer drill. Dremel’s neatly balanced 12-volt tool is made for fixing, tightening, and assembling. The detachable laser level and clever electronic stud finder hidden in the front of the handle make it ideal for hanging pictures, shelves, and 4K TVs. Comes with nine drivers and three drill bits, covering most household fixes without the need for a complete toolbox overhaul.
paragraphs.zh: 这款“无压力”动力工具非常适合那些想要轻松处理各种家务，却又不需要大号冲击钻的人。Dremel 的这款平衡良好的 12 伏工具，专为修理、拧紧和组装而设计。前端隐藏的可拆卸激光水平仪和巧妙的电子找桩器，让它非常适合挂画、安装搁板以及 4K 电视。它附带 9 个驱动头和 3 个钻头，可覆盖大部分家庭修理，无需彻底更换整个工具箱。

paragraphs.en: A compact, open-source soldering workstation that condenses a full electronics bench into a single portable unit. The battery-powered soldering iron offers precise temperature control from 212 to 842 degrees Fahrenheit (100 to 450 Celsius), making it suitable for delicate PCB work as well as more robust tasks. Integrated fume extraction pulls harmful vapors away at the source, while built-in magnification and adjustable LED lighting improve visibility. The clincher is that by being open-source, Soldr positively welcomes hardware tweaks and firmware upgrades, making it as appealing to hobbyists as it is to serious prototypers.
paragraphs.zh: 这是一款体积小巧的开源焊接工作站，将完整的电子操作台压缩到一个可携带单元中。电池供电的烙铁可精确控温，范围为212至842华氏度（100至450摄氏度），既适合精细的印刷电路板作业，也能胜任更有强度要求的焊接任务。内置的烟雾抽走装置可在源头带走有害蒸汽，内置放大镜和可调节LED照明进一步提升了可视性。更关键的是，它是开源产品，因此Soldr乐于接受硬件改装和固件升级，这使它对业余爱好者和严肃的原型开发者都同样有吸引力。

paragraphs.en: It is well known in the trades that if someone’s workshop is full of Festool gear, you can bet they take their craft seriously. And with its new 18 V cordless sander, the brand has made the possibility of achieving perfection just that bit faster. The triangular pad reaches deep into corners and tight edges, while variable speed control allows for fine-tuning between aggressive stock removal and ultrasmooth finishing. Weighing just over 2.4 lbs without the battery, the sander is designed for controlled, one-handed operation, while the integrated LED casts low-angle illumination across your work surface to highlight even the slightest imperfections. Connect it to a vacuum hose to keep the work table clean, or snap on the included dust collection bag and go fully mobile.
paragraphs.zh: 在行业里人们都很清楚：如果一个人的车间里摆满了Festool设备，可以断定他是真心对待自己手艺的。随着新推出的18伏无绳砂光机，品牌让“追求完美”这件事变得更快实现。三角形磨盘能深入角落和紧凑边缘，而可变速控制可在激烈除材和超细打磨之间进行细致调节。该砂光机在不带电池时重量略超2.4磅，专为可控的一手操作设计；内置LED则在工作面上投射低角度光线，连最细微的瑕疵都能被放大。可将其连接到吸尘软管以保持工作台清洁，也可装上附带的集尘袋实现完全移动作业。

paragraphs.en: Put the trundle wheel down; this modular, stackable touch screen measuring system combines laser distance, level, and rolling scale modules in one, measuring up to 164 feet of distance at a 1/16-inch accuracy. The system captures measurements in real time and syncs instantly to the app, allowing users to generate floor plans or mark up dimensions without manual note-taking. Compact enough to fit in a pocket yet precise enough for professional use, it’s a seriously smart upgrade for anyone still juggling tape measures and spirit levels.
paragraphs.zh: 把脚轮放下吧；这套模块化、可叠加的触控测量系统将激光测距、水平仪和卷尺模块整合在一起，测距可达164英尺，精度高达1/16英寸。系统能够实时采集测量数据并即时同步到应用程序，让用户无需手工记笔记就能生成平面图或标注尺寸。尺寸虽小到可装进口袋，却又足够精确，适合专业使用，对仍在依赖卷尺和水平尺的人来说，这是一次相当聪明的升级。

paragraphs.en: While it might be overkill if you’ve not yet mastered the art of sewing buttons back on, this pro-grade smart sewing machine can do seriously impressive things with a needle and thread. It offers more than 680 stitch patterns through an 8-inch color touch screen for intuitive control, alongside automatic thread tension and sensor-based foot adjustments. The extended sewing surface allows for large quilting projects, while the powerful motor ensures consistent stitch quality across thick fabrics. Built-in connectivity and access to the mySewnet Library give you access to a continuously growing collection of embroidery designs, plus the ability to craft and implement your own.
paragraphs.zh: 如果你还没掌握重新缝纽扣的技巧，这台专业级的智能缝纫机可能显得有点超纲，但它确实能用针线完成很多令人惊艳的事。它通过8英寸彩色触摸屏提供680多种针法图案，操作直观，并配有自动线迹张力和基于传感器的压脚自动调节。延长的缝纫台适合更大型的拼布项目，而强力马达则可在厚实面料上保持稳定的针脚质量。内置连网功能并可连接 mySewnet 图库，让你接入持续扩充的刺绣设计库，还能自己设计并实现个性化图案。

paragraphs.en: Designed by noted knife maker Richard Rogers, the Box Key applies his clean, minimalist approach to a tiny everyday cutter. The 1.24-inch drop point blade is made from Sandvik 12C27 steel with a stone-wash finish, which helps disguise scuffs from daily use while improving corrosion resistance. The stainless steel handle with a hole keeps the profile slim enough to attach to a key ring, and at 1 ounce, it adds barely any weight to your daily carry. A smart, indispensable little tool for opening boxes, trimming cord, and other light-duty jobs.
paragraphs.zh: 知名刀具品牌理查德·罗杰斯为Box Key带来了其一贯的干净极简美学，打造出这把微型日常开切器。1.24英寸的落点刀片采用Sandvik 12C27钢材，并经过仿石纹处理表面，可在日常使用中更好地掩盖磕碰磨损，同时提升防锈性。不锈钢手柄带有通孔，体积纤细，足以挂在钥匙圈上；重约1盎司，几乎不增加日常携带负担。这是一把开箱、修剪线缆等轻量作业中既聪明又必不可少的小工具。

paragraphs.en: Japanese-inspired, UK-based Niwaki (translates as “garden tree”) produces seriously desirable and practical tools for home and garden. With the ST-Type Toolbox, however, the brand has created a vintage design that wouldn’t look out of place perched on a girder in the famous “Lunch Atop a Skyscraper” photo. Built from powder-coated steel with a traditional cantilever design, it measures 14.2 inches wide and opens to reveal tiered compartments that keep hand tools organized and visible. The metal dividers in the top trays can be rearranged to hold screws, nails, and bits, or removed entirely to fit even more tools.
paragraphs.zh: 受日本美学启发、总部位于英国的Niwaki（意为“园中树”）打造了一系列兼具吸引力与实用性的居家园艺工具。然而它们的ST-Type工具箱却颇具复古气质，放在《午餐在摩天大楼上》那张著名照片里的钢梁上也不会格格不入。它采用粉末涂层钢并运用传统悬臂结构设计，宽度为14.2英寸，展开后呈现分层抽屉，可将手工工具有序摆放并一目了然。顶部托盘中的金属隔板可以重新组合以放置螺丝、钉子和钻头，也可以整体取下，以容纳更多工具。

paragraphs.en: Pit Viper may be famous for its right-wing-baiting anarchic approach to eyewear, but we bet you didn’t know it also does a fantastic range of equally irreverent-looking, but highly practical safety glasses. (This model will launch on April 13.) Certified to ANSI Z87+ standards, they have impact-resistant lenses, 100 percent UV protection, antifog coatings, plus adjustable arms and nose pieces for a super-secure fit. Available with standard- or high-contrast polarized lenses, the side shields can be removed when not needed.
paragraphs.zh: Pit Viper因其对“右翼钓鱼”式反叛形象的眼镜风格而出名，但我们敢打赌你可能不知道，它同样推出了一系列外观同样大胆、不拘一格却极其实用的安全眼镜。（该款预计于4月13日发布。）它们通过了ANSI Z87+标准认证，具备抗冲击镜片、100%紫外线防护、防雾涂层，以及可调节的镜臂和鼻托，佩戴稳定性非常出色。可选择标准或高对比偏光镜片，并且侧翼在不需要时可拆卸。

paragraphs.en: A good value, highly practical camp saw that folds small, but still cuts the mustard. The 12-inch blade is mounted on a four-pivot frame that maximizes usable cutting length and keeps tension consistent through each stroke. Then, when you’re done, it folds flat without disassembly, fully enclosing the blade for safe transport. Weighing 15.3 ounces, it is light enough for any expedition, but still feels reassuringly robust in use. That grippy rubberized textured handle works well in wet conditions, while thankfully, the design accepts standard 12-inch replacement blades.
paragraphs.zh: 这款露营锯性价比高、非常实用，折叠后体积很小，却仍然性能十足。12 英寸锯片安装在一个四枢纽框架上，可最大化可用切割长度，并在每一下切割中保持稳定张力。使用完后，它可直接折叠变平，不需拆卸，就能把锯片完全包住，方便安全运输。它重 15.3 盎司，轻到适合任何远足探险场景，同时在实际使用时依然带来安心稳健的手感。带纹理的防滑橡胶手柄在潮湿环境下表现出色，而且该设计还兼容标准的 12 英寸替换锯片。

paragraphs.en: This high-speed 3D printer is built for rapid prototyping, and so is aimed at designers who are tired of overnight prints for simple parts. It spits out building material at speeds of up to 1,200 millimeters per second, driven by a lightweight and accurate delta motion system. The enclosed cylindrical build chamber (12.6 x 16.9 inches) improves temperature stability for materials such as ABS and PETG, while auto-leveling and smart calibration should reduce setup time. A direct-drive extruder with an all-metal nozzle capable of reaching 350 Celsius supports a wide range of filaments. Wi-Fi, an onboard camera, and AI-assisted monitoring all help keep prints on track.
paragraphs.zh: 这款高速 3D 打印机专为快速打样而生，专为那些厌倦了为简单部件整夜等待打印的设计师而打造。它每秒可喷出高达 1,200 毫米的打印材料，由轻量且精准的 delta 运动系统驱动。封闭式圆柱形成型腔（12.6 × 16.9 英寸）可提升 ABS、PETG 等材料的温度稳定性，同时自动调平与智能校准有助于缩短调试时间。配有直驱挤出机和可达 350 摄氏度的全金属喷嘴，支持更广泛的丝材。Wi-Fi、内置摄像头，以及 AI 辅助监控共同帮助打印过程更稳定。

paragraphs.en: The 1972 NASA Moon Buggy is one of only a handful of “products” WIRED has ever awarded a coveted 10/10 score to. It’s a shame you’ll never be able to get your hands on one, but you can always scratch that interstellar itch with this fantastic build-it-yourself Mars Perseverance Rover electronics kit. Designed for STEM learning, it combines more than 200 parts with coding, robotics, and mechanical assembly into a single project. Users can program movement, sensors, and basic autonomy through an included microcontroller, gaining hands-on experience with real-world engineering concepts. As intricate and detailed as it is, the whole model is remarkably smaller than the family cat.
paragraphs.zh: 1972 年的 NASA 月球车是 WIRED 曾经少数被赋予宝贵“10/10”评分的“产品”之一。遗憾的是你永远买不到它，但你可以用这款出色的火星“毅力号”漫游车 DIY 套件来满足那份太空探索欲。该套件面向 STEM 学习设计，将 200 余个部件与编程、机器人和机械装配融合为一个完整项目。用户可通过内置微控制器编写程序，控制运动、传感器和基础自主功能，从而获得贴近真实工程的实践体验。尽管它结构精密复杂，整套模型却出乎意料地比家里的猫还小。

paragraphs.en: Bringing some much-needed sci-fi chic to yard work with this cordless 20-volt blower that pushes 720 cubic feet of air per minute at 120 mph from a lightweight body. The compact 3.7-pound design (without battery) makes it easy to use with one hand, even if you’re coping with trees post-leaf-peeping season. A brushless motor improves efficiency and extends the blower’s lifespan, while stepless speed control allows precise adjustment to give you just enough wind to clear light debris all the way up to a full-force clearing. The lithium-ion battery lasts up to 30 minutes, and it’s removable, so you can buy extra batteries to quickly swap in and keep on blowing.
paragraphs.zh: 这款无绳 20 伏草坪吹风机将“年度必备”级科幻感带到了院子里：它能以每分钟 720 立方英尺、120 英里/小时的风量和风速向外喷射。轻巧的机身（不含电池）重 3.7 磅，即使在落叶季后清理树木附近碎枝时，也能轻松单手操作。无刷电机提高了效率并延长使用寿命，而无级变速控制可精确调节风力，让你从轻微清理微尘到全速清场都能随需应变。锂离子电池最长可续航 30 分钟，而且可拆卸，你可以再购置备用电池，快速更换后持续吹扫。

paragraphs.en: Stackable with Milwaukee storage systems, this sound system has a classic rock-ready 10-speaker array capable of blasting The Boss to every corner of a construction site. Built tough and powered either by plugging it in or using the standard M18 battery, it has Bluetooth connectivity and an AM-FM radio. It also doubles as a battery and USB charger for smartphones and power tools. A reinforced housing protects it against drops, dust, and moisture.
paragraphs.zh: 这款音响可与Milwaukee储物系统叠放，内置一套经典摇滚级10单元扬声器阵列，能把《The Boss》的声音轰到施工现场的每个角落。机身坚固耐用，可使用外接电源或标准M18电池供电，具备蓝牙连接和AM/FM收音机功能。它还能兼作智能手机和电动工具的电池与USB充电器。强化外壳可防摔、抗尘、防潮。

paragraphs.en: A compact, battery-powered cutter designed to remove the effort and improve the precision of a host of cutting tasks. The motorized blade uses SK5 high-carbon steel slicers, delivering clean, controlled cuts through everything from cardboard and fabric to leather and even some plastics. Weighing 10.5 ounces, it is easy to guide with one hand, while the 4V rechargeable lithium battery should let you slice for hours on a single charge. A guarded cutting-edge and trigger activation improve control further, as well as keeping your fingers safe.
paragraphs.zh: 这是一款小巧的电池驱动切割工具，旨在减少劳动强度并提升多种切割任务的精确度。电机刀片采用SK5高碳钢刀片，能够对纸板、布料、皮革甚至部分塑料实现干净、可控的切割。重约10.5盎司，单手即可轻松引导；4V可充电锂电池可让你单次充电切割数小时。带护套的切割刃和扳机式启动进一步提升了控制力，并且能更好地保护手指安全。

paragraphs.en: This kid-safe router-style cutter is a perfect antidote to the usual screen time. Using a digitally controlled blunt cutting head rather than exposed blades, it lets children (big and small) cut cardboard, card, foam, felt, thin fabrics, and light plastics at either 1,500 rpm for faster cuts or 800 rpm for more controlled work. The standard head can handle materials up to 3 mm thick, but an optional upgrade to a 5 mm “ProCut” head lets you go thicker. The compact 11.8 x 11.8-inch desktop unit comes in pink or green (go pink!) and connects over USB or Wi-Fi to bundled software that can generate cutting templates from simple project designs you upload. The Cutter 2 serves up fun and engaging activities for little ones as young as four.
paragraphs.zh: 这款儿童安全的路由器式切割机，是应对孩子“刷屏时间”问题的理想替代方案。它采用数字控制的钝切头，而非暴露刀片，让大孩子和小孩子都能安全切割纸板、卡纸、泡沫、毛毡、薄织物以及轻质塑料；在1500转/分钟可实现更快切割，在800转/分钟则更适合精细可控操作。标准切割头可处理最高3毫米厚的材料，而可选的5毫米“ProCut”升级头则可处理更厚材料。这个紧凑的桌面式机型尺寸为11.8 x 11.8英寸，提供粉色或绿色（推荐粉色）两种颜色，并可通过USB或Wi-Fi与附带软件连接，后者可根据你上传的简单项目设计生成切割模板。“Cutter 2”为年幼孩子（最小可到4岁）带来有趣且吸引人的活动。
